mapper.select: SELECT R_ID, ID, G_ID, R_TITLE, IMG_URL, CONTENT, VIEWS, COMMENTS, STAR, CATEGORY FROM REVIEW ORDER BY R_ID DESC
SELECT R_ID, ID, G_ID, R_TITLE, IMG_URL, CONTENT, VIEWS, COMMENTS, STAR, CATEGORY FROM REVIEW2 ORDER BY R_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW (R_ID, ID, G_ID, R_TITLE, IMG_URL, CONTENT, STAR) VALUES (REVIEW_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 1, 1, #{title}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{content}, #{star})
INSERT INTO REVIEW2 (R_ID, ID, G_ID, R_TITLE, IMG_URL, CONTENT, STAR) VALUES (REVIEW_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 1, 1, #{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{content}, #{star})
mapper.select: SELECT R_ID, ID, G_ID, R_TITLE, IMG_URL, CONTENT, VIEWS, COMMENTS, STAR, CATEGORY FROM REVIEW WHERE R_ID = #{idx}
